name: Italian: Olive Garden Shrimp Cristoforo
recipeIngredient: Grated Parmesan cheese (3 tablespoons) plus additional for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any large stems from the basil and wash the leaves. Shake off excess water and dry with a paper towel.
2. Place the basil in a food processor and pulse until finely chopped. Process in batches if necessary to achieve a uniformly chopped texture.
3. Remove the basil from the processor and set aside.
4. In a small bowl, beat the softened butter using an electric mixer until pliable.
5. Add minced garlic, salt, pepper, grated Parmesan cheese, and grated Romano cheese to the butter mixture. Mix until well incorporated.
6. Use the basil butter immediately or store it covered in the refrigerator for up to 3-4 days.
7. Cook the pasta according to package directions, drain well, and keep warm.
8. Melt the basil butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the shrimp and sauté until just done, about 2-3 minutes.
9. Serve hot over the cooked pasta, passing freshly grated Parmesan cheese on the side.
10. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
